title: High Pressure Shower Head and Hose 1.8m, OHDAY 6 Spray Modes Powerful Handheld Showerhead Built-in Power Wash to Clean Tub Tile Pets Bathroom Corner
features: [ 6 SPRAY MODES WITH BUILT - IN POWER WASH ] : OHDAY Handheld shower head has 6 settings for choice , which gives you a different shower experience . Especially the Built-in Power Wash mode , With just a simple press of the back button on the hand shower heads , it transforms into a powerful spray mode ! It serves as a reliable assistant for pet bathing , cleaning toilets , mopping , tile walls , tubs , and hard-to-reach corners

[ SUPERIOR MATERIAL & ANTI - CLOG NOZZELS ] : Made from high-quality ABS material , this shower head with handheld is lightweight , rust-proof , fade-proof and durable . High pressure showerhead features an advanced design with anti-clog nozzles , ensuring that the water outlets won’t become blocked easily . You can enjoy a truly luxurious shower experience in your bathroom

[ STAINLESS STEEL FLEXIBLE 70'' HOSE ] : The stainless steel shower hose is lightweight , highly flexible and anti-twist design . With an extra-long 1.8 meter length, it provides ample reach for showering, cleaning, and bathing pets and children, ensuring a more comfortable and convenient experience

[ HIGH PRESSURE DESIGN & WATER SAVING ] : Our high pressure shower heads is equipped with a unique technology that distributes water pressure evenly at each outlet , effectively solving the problem of low water pressure . Unique self-cleaning silicone nozzle focuses the water flow and helps to pressurize the water while saving water. Let you wash off soap and shampoo easily and enjoy your shower time more pleasantly

[SATISFACTORY AFTER-SALES SERVICE ] : We are committed to providing customers with high quality products, if you encounter any problems when using this hand-held shower head, please feel free to contact us, we will provide you with perfect after-sales service within 24 hours
description: Product Description 6 Spray Modes OHDAY high pressure shower heads adopt 6 Spray Settings , including : 1.Misty 2.Rain 3.Rain & Misty 4.Massage 5.Rain & Massage 6.Point Jet Each mode brings you different shower experience . Built - In Power Wash With just a simple press of the back button on the hand shower heads , it transforms into a powerful spray mode ! It serves as a reliable assistant for pet bathing , cleaning toilets , mopping , tile walls , tubs , and hard-to-reach corners . Showerhead Packge Include 70-inch stainless steel hose , Anti-leakage teflon tape , 2 pcs rubber washers , Detailed installation instructions . This Detachable Shower Head includes all the necessary components . Easy Installation You just need to follow the instructions step by step to easily install . The showerhead features universal G1/2" threads , suitable for all standard showers and can be easily installed without the need for professional assistance . Satisfaction After-sales Service We are committed to providing our customers with high quality products, If you have any problems while using this handheld shower head, We will solve your problem within 24 hours.
